```{r, include=FALSE}
is_hough_cpp_loaded <- function() {
  if (!exists("make_accumulator", inherits = TRUE)) {
    return(FALSE)
  }
  probe <- try(
    make_accumulator(
      matrix(0, nrow = 2, ncol = 2),
      detector = function(x) x,
      rho_step = 1,
      theta_step = 0.1
    ),
    silent = TRUE
  )
  !inherits(probe, "try-error")
}

if (!exists("cssa_esprit_setup_loaded", inherits = FALSE) || !is_hough_cpp_loaded()) {
find_project_root <- function() {
  start <- normalizePath(getwd(), winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
  current <- start

  repeat {
    if (file.exists(file.path(current, "ssa-based methods", "cssa-transform.r"))) {
      return(current)
    }

    parent <- dirname(current)
    if (identical(parent, current)) {
      stop("Cannot find project root with ssa-based methods/cssa-transform.r")
    }
    current <- parent
  }
}

project_root <- find_project_root()
options(ssa_image_project_root = project_root)

.libPaths(.libPaths()[
  normalizePath(.libPaths(), winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE) !=
    normalizePath(file.path(project_root, ".r-local-lib"), winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
])

if (!requireNamespace("DT", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("Missing package: DT")
}

source(file.path(project_root, "ssa-based methods", "cssa-transform.r"))
source(file.path(project_root, "hough transform", "hough_transform.r"))

dt_table <- function(x, caption = NULL, page_length = 10L) {
  DT::datatable(
    x,
    caption = caption,
    rownames = FALSE,
    options = list(
      pageLength = page_length,
      scrollX = TRUE
    )
  )
}

clip01 <- function(m) {
  m <- as.matrix(m)
  m[!is.finite(m)] <- 0
  m[m < 0.001] <- 0
  m[m > 0.99] <- 1
  m
}

cssa_denoise <- function(m, num_of_lines = 1L, method = "row.row", clip = TRUE) {
  cleaned <- switch(
    method,
    "col.col" = m |> dft() |> cssa.col(num.line = num_of_lines) |> idft.col() |> Re(),
    "col.row" = m |> dft() |> cssa.col(num.line = num_of_lines) |> idft.row() |> Re(),
    "row.col" = m |> dft() |> cssa.row(num.line = num_of_lines) |> idft.col() |> Re(),
    "row.row" = m |> dft() |> cssa.row(num.line = num_of_lines) |> idft.row() |> Re(),
    stop("Unknown CSSA method: ", method)
  )

  if (clip) clip01(cleaned) else cleaned
}

make_line_matrix <- function(n_row = 100L, n_col = 100L, a = 2, b = -1) {
  matrix(0, nrow = n_row, ncol = n_col) |>
    add.line(a = a, b = b)
}

convert_ab_to_rho_theta <- function(a, b) {
  theta <- atan2(1, -a)
  rho <- b / sqrt(a^2 + 1)

  if (theta < 0) {
    theta <- theta + pi
    rho <- -rho
  }

  c(rho = rho, theta = theta)
}

find_k_max <- function(acc, k, qrho, qtheta, suppress = FALSE, window = 6L) {
  acc_copy <- acc
  maxima <- vector("list", k)

  for (i in seq_len(k)) {
    idx <- which(acc_copy == max(acc_copy), arr.ind = TRUE)[1L, ]
    maxima[[i]] <- c(rho = qrho[idx[1L]], theta = qtheta[idx[2L]])

    if (suppress) {
      rows <- max(1L, idx[1L] - window):min(nrow(acc_copy), idx[1L] + window)
      cols <- max(1L, idx[2L] - window):min(ncol(acc_copy), idx[2L] + window)
      acc_copy[rows, cols] <- 0
    } else {
      acc_copy[idx[1L], idx[2L]] <- 0
    }
  }

  out <- do.call(rbind, maxima)
  colnames(out) <- c("rho", "theta")
  out
}

line_parameter_error <- function(true_line, pred_line) {
  theta_error <- function(x, y) atan2(sin(x - y), cos(x - y))^2

  rho <- true_line["rho"]
  theta <- true_line["theta"]
  pred_rho <- pred_line["rho"]
  pred_theta <- pred_line["theta"]

  direct <- c(
    rho_mse = unname((rho - pred_rho)^2),
    theta_mse = unname(theta_error(theta, pred_theta))
  )
  flipped <- c(
    rho_mse = unname((rho + pred_rho)^2),
    theta_mse = unname(theta_error(theta, pred_theta + pi))
  )

  if (sum(direct) <= sum(flipped)) direct else flipped
}

cssa_esprit_setup_loaded <- TRUE
}
```
